calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Non-Parties' Amended Petition To Quash
Off Calendar Jan-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: (Mini-minutes for 1/15/15 - Part 1 of 2)

APPEARANCES: Atty. SIDNEY S. LIEBESMAN of Montgomery McCracken, Tel No. (215) 772-7269 appearing for Petitioner Theodore F. Schroeder;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. NON-PARTIES PINTEREST, INC., BEN SILBERMANN, MICHELE DIGIACOMO, EVAN SHARP, PAUL SCIARRA, AND JUSTIN EDMUND'S Amended Petition To Quash is granted in part and denied in part. As to the Subpoena to Pinterest, Inc./Ben Silbermann, by category of document: numbers 1-4: Modified. All document requests are limited to communications between Brian S. Cohen and any other person that refer or relate to any of the plaintiffs from February 1, 2009 to December 26, 2012. Numbers 5 - 9: Granted. Number 10: Modified. All documents that refer or relate to www.rendezvoo.com, RDV Version 2, the "Launchbed" platform, and Skoopwire.com from February 1, 2009 to December 26, 2012. Numbers 11-25: Granted. Number 26: Modified. All final document preservation mandates, policies or procedures from inception of the company to December 26, 2012. Pinterest, Inc. shall present a witness to appear at a deposition pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure 2025.290. The deposition shall be completed on one calendar day. As to the Subpoena to Ben Silbermann, by category of document: Numbers 1-5, 7-8: Granted. Number 6: Modified. All documents that refer or relate to Theodore Schroeder, Brandon Stroy (Compl., 12), William Bocra (Compl., 14), RendezVoo (Compl., 14), Skoopwire (Compl., 37) from February 1, 2009 to December 26, 2012. Ben Silbermann shall appear for a deposition pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure 2025.290. The deposition shall be completed on one calendar day. As to the Subpoena to Michelle DiGiacomo: Granted in its entirety. Michelle DiGiacomo shall not appear at her deposition. As to the Subpoena to Evan Sharp, by category of document: Number 1: Modified. All communications between Evan Sharp and Brian S. Cohen that refer or relate to any of the plaintiffs from February 1, 2009 to December 26, 2012. Number 2: granted with modification. All communications between Evan Sharp and any other principal of Pinterest that refer or relate to any of the plaintiffs from February 1, 2009 to December 26, 2012. Number 3: granted with modification. All communications between Evan Sharp and Vikram Bhaskaran that refer or relate to any of the plaintiffs from February 1, 2009 to December 26, 2012. Number 4: granted with modification. All communications between Evan Sharp and Justin Edmund that refer or relate to any of the plaintiffs from February 1, 2009 to December 26, 2012. Numbers 5-15: Granted. Evan Sharp shall appear for a deposition pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure 2025.290. The deposition shall be completed on one calendar day. (Continued to Part 2)

Hearing On Non-Parties' Amended Petition To Quash.
Off Calendar Jan-15-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: (Minute Minutes for 1/15/15 - Part 2 of 2)

As to the Subpoena to Paul Sciarra, by category of document: Number 1: granted with modification. All communications between Paul Sciarra and Brian S. Cohen that refer or relate to any of the plaintiffs from February 1, 2009 to December 26, 2012. Number 2: Modified: All communications between Paul Sciarra and any other principal of Pinterest that refer or relate to any of the plaintiffs from February 1, 2009 to December 26, 2012. Number 3: Modified: All communications between Paul Sciarra and Vikram Bhaskaran that refer or relate to any of the plaintiffs from February 1, 2009 to December 26, 2012. Number 4: Modified: All communications between Paul Sciarra and Justin Edmund that refer or relate to any of the plaintiffs from February 1, 2009 to December 26, 2012. Numbers 5-15: Granted. Paul Sciarra shall appear for a deposition pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure 2025.290. The deposition shall be completed on one calendar day. As to the Subpoena to Justin Edmund, by category of document: Number 1: Modified: All communications between Justin Edmund and Brian S. Cohen that refer or relate to any of the plaintiffs from February 1, 2009 to December 26, 2012. Number 2: Modified: All communications between Justin Edmund and any other principal of Pinterest that refer or relate to any of the plaintiffs from February 1, 2009 to December 26, 2012. Number 3: Modified: All communications between Justin Edmund and Vikram Bhaskaran that refer or relate to any of the plaintiffs from February 1, 2009 to December 26, 2012. Numbers 4-14: Granted. Justin Edmund shall appear for a deposition. The deposition is limited to a half day. All requests for sanctions are denied. ATTORNEY MR. LIEBESMAN SHALL ENSURE THAT A PROPOSED ORDER IS PREPARED AND SUBMITTED TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)

Notice Of Hearing On Non-Parties' Amended Petition To Quash
Off Calendar Dec-15-2014 Continued To Jan-15-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on Monday, December 15, 2014:
Sidney S. Liebesman of Montgomery McCracken Walker & Rhoads LLP (215.772.7279) - attorney by Special Appearance [the Application to Admit Counsel Pro Hac Vice filed on DEC-10-2014 is pending] for Petitioners/Opposing Parties THEODORE F. SCHROEDER, RENDEZVOO LLC, AND SKOOP MEDIA ASSOCIATES, INC.;
Rachel H. Kassabian and Carolyn H. Thomas of quinn emanuel urquhart & sullivan, llp (650.801.5000), attorneys for Non-Parties/Moving Parties PINTEREST, INC., BEN SILBERMANN, MICHELE DIGIACOMO, EVAN SHARP, PAUL SCIARRA, and JUSTIN EDMUND.

The Non-Parties (Moving Parties) will not stipulate to have this motion heard before the judge pro tem. The motion is argued for the judge pro tem to prepare a report and recommendation.

Non-Parties PINTEREST, INC., BEN SILBERMANN, MICHELE DIGIACOMO, EVAN SHARP, PAUL SCIARRA, and JUSTIN EDMUND'S Hearing On Amended Petition To Quash is continued to January 15, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Judge Pro Tem: Peter C. Catalanotti; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Hearing On Non-Parties' Amended Petition To Quash
Off Calendar Dec-12-2014 Continued To Dec-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on Friday, December 12, 2014. The Court modifies and adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Non-Parties PINTEREST, INC., BEN SILBERMANN, MICHELE DIGIACOMO, EVAN SHARP, PAUL SCIARRA, and JUSTIN EDMUND'S Amended Petition To Quash is continued to December 15, 2014 on the court's own motion. Counsel noticed by the court. Judge Pro Tem: Peter C. Catalanotti; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
